hero.title: Integrated Healthcare Management, All in One Platform
hero.description: Manage patients, doctors, appointments, and medical records in one simple system.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to manage your clinic
features.description: Save time, stay organized, and improve patient care

multiRole.title: Multi-Role Platform
multiRole.description: Admins, doctors, patients, and staff access customized dashboards based on their role.

analytics.title: Real-Time Dashboard & Analytics
analytics.description: Monitor patients, occupancy, revenue, and trends in real time.

financial.title: Billing & Financial Control
financial.description: Track revenue, invoices, and payments in one place.

workflow.title: Clinical Workflow Management
workflow.description: Handle consultations, orders, and follow-ups efficiently

management.title: Scalable Clinic Management
management.description: Adapt the system to your clinic's structure as it grows.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy & Medication Management
pharmacy.description: Integrate pharmacy operations with prescriptions and inventory.

clients.label: Who is Vitalia for?
clients.title: From solo practices to healthcare networks
clients.description: Whether you run a private practice or manage a large medical center, Vitalia adapts to your needs.

privatePractices.title: Private Practices
privatePractices.description: Run your entire practice with ease. Manage patients, appointments, and records without complexity

clinics.title: Clinics & Medical Centers
clinics.description: Keep your operations fully connected. Coordinate teams, schedules, and workflows in one system

networks.title: Healthcare Networks
networks.description: Scale with full visibility and control. Manage multiple locations from a single platform

contact.label: Contact Us
contact.title: Get in touch with us
contact.description: Have questions or want to see Vitalia in action? Our team is here to help.

about.label: About
about.title: About KinetiaLabs
about.paragraphOne: KinetiaLabs is a technology company focused on building solutions that transform how healthcare systems operate.
about.paragraphTwo: With a strong emphasis on integration and efficiency, we develop platforms like Vitalia to simplify clinical workflows, improve decision-making, and enhance patient care.
about.paragraphThree: Our mission is to empower healthcare providers with tools that adapt to their growth from small practices to large networks.

hero.description: Gestiona pacientes, médicos, citas e historias clínicas en un sistema simple.

about.label: Acerca de
about.title: Acerca de KinetiaLabs
about.paragraphOne: KinetiaLabs es una empresa de tecnología enfocada en crear soluciones que transforman la forma en que operan los sistemas de salud.
about.paragraphTwo: Con un fuerte enfoque en integración y eficiencia, desarrollamos plataformas como Vitalia para simplificar flujos clínicos, mejorar la toma de decisiones y potenciar la atención al paciente.
about.paragraphThree: Nuestra misión es empoderar a los proveedores de salud con herramientas que se adaptan a su crecimiento, desde consultorios pequeños hasta grandes redes.
